title: Codex New Project Start
prompt_text: Create the local MVP for the specified AI Agent project. Read project status files first, keep edits scoped, use demo data, add tests and docs, and report validation honestly.
usage_note: Use when starting a new portfolio project with a clear checkpoint and path.
safety_note: Do not read .env, credentials, private data, browser cookies, or unrelated repos.

title: Codex Continue Current Checkpoint
prompt_text: Continue from the current checkpoint. Read AGENTS.md if present, then PROJECT_STATUS.md, README.md, and relevant docs. Avoid repeated work and make the smallest useful progress.
usage_note: Use when a repo already has a known checkpoint and the next step is implied.
safety_note: If the project is GitHub + Profile Pin complete, pause unless the user explicitly reopens it.

title: GitHub Public Release Prep
prompt_text: Prepare the repository for a public GitHub showcase. Confirm README, screenshots, manifest, .gitignore, safety boundary, tests, compile checks, and absence of secrets or private outputs.
usage_note: Use after the local MVP is complete and the user explicitly asks for GitHub showcase work.
safety_note: Do not push, modify remotes, or publish unless explicitly requested.

title: Screenshot And README Polish
prompt_text: Polish the README and screenshot guide so the project value, target users, core workflow, local setup, and safety boundary are clear for public viewers.
usage_note: Use when UI is stable enough to capture demo screenshots.
safety_note: Use demo screenshots only and avoid private paths or account details.

title: Scoped Bugfix
prompt_text: Reproduce the bug, inspect the smallest responsible area, patch it, add a focused regression test, and run pytest plus compileall.
usage_note: Use for concrete failing behavior, not vague feature expansion.
safety_note: Do not use unrelated refactors as part of the bugfix.

title: Checkpoint Status Sync
prompt_text: Synchronize README, PROJECT_STATUS, docs, and manifest fields with the actual implementation state. Do not overstate GitHub, pin, or production readiness.
usage_note: Use after a milestone or before a release pass.
safety_note: Keep it metadata-only unless feature work is explicitly requested.

title: Video Or Image Analysis Workflow
prompt_text: Extract visible text, spoken content, key ideas, action items, and structured notes from provided media. Export a concise Markdown or document report.
usage_note: Use for demo-safe media analysis or local files explicitly provided by the user.
safety_note: Do not upload private media or expose personal information in public outputs.

title: Business Opportunity Analysis
prompt_text: Analyze target users, pain points, repeated work, information gaps, willingness to pay, MVP scope, and portfolio showcase value.
usage_note: Use during project positioning or commercial-readiness planning.
safety_note: Separate portfolio demo claims from real client delivery claims.

title: Study And Assignment Support
prompt_text: Help structure study notes or assignment drafts with clear arguments, examples, and source-aware reasoning while preserving the user's own final judgment.
usage_note: Use for learning support, outline generation, and draft review.
safety_note: Do not fabricate citations or submit work as if it were independently verified.

title: Outreach Email Draft
prompt_text: Draft a concise outreach email that states the target user's pain, a small automation offer, proof of capability, and a low-friction next step.
usage_note: Use after a project has a stable portfolio demo and clear target user.
safety_note: Do not send emails or automate account actions without explicit confirmation.
